overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit cyberpunk-style bathroom from a video game. The player slowly pans across the room examining fixtures including a sink, toilet, washing machine, and concrete bathtub before approaching a green metal exit door with an interaction prompt.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bathroom sink and toilet area

agents.ego_description: slowly panning right from the sink area toward the toilet, examining the bathroom fixtures

entered.detail: dark wooden cabinet with bottles and boxes on top
large mirror with horizontal cyan neon light above
white ceramic toilet with open lid
front-loading washing machine with digital display
rectangular concrete bathtub with grimy texture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dimly lit cyberpunk bathroom with cyan neon lighting above the mirror. The camera slowly pans right from the dark wood cabinet and metal sink toward the toilet, revealing a washing machine and concrete bathtub in the background. The space is narrow with tiled walls and floors, creating an enclosed industrial atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: bathroom center with washing machine and bathtub

events.description: warm orange wall light becomes visible above the bathtub area, mixing with the cyan neon

agents.ego_description: moving forward through the bathroom, passing the toilet and approaching the washing machine and bathtub

entered.detail: translucent plastic shower curtain with yellow stripes
horizontal warm orange light fixture on wall above bathtub
dark green metal exit door with handle

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through the bathroom center, passing close to the toilet and focusing on the washing machine and concrete bathtub. A warm orange wall light illuminates the bathtub area, contrasting with the cool cyan neon. The green exit door becomes visible in the background as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: bathroom exit area near green metal door

events.description: game UI interaction prompt 'Open' appears on screen near the door handle

agents.ego_description: moving toward the green exit door, preparing to interact with it as indicated by the UI prompt

entered.detail: metal door handle on the green exit door

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the green metal exit door at the far end of the bathroom. The concrete bathtub and shower curtain recede to the left as the door fills the center of the frame. At approximately 50 seconds, a game UI prompt appears indicating the door can be opened. The lighting remains mixed with warm tones near the bathtub and cooler tones near the door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit cyberpunk bathroom that transitions from a narrow, neon-lit corner toward a distant exit. It begins with a slow pan right from a dark wood cabinet and metal sink, gliding past a toilet to reveal a washing machine and concrete bathtub within the enclosed industrial space. As the camera advances through the center of the room, the cool cyan neon lighting above the mirror gives way to a warm orange glow illuminating the bathtub area. The scene then shifts focus toward the far end of the room, where the bathtub and shower curtain recede to the left as a green metal door fills the frame. Finally, the camera comes to a halt before the door as a game UI interaction prompt appears, completing the progression through the mixed-tone lighting of the facility.
